steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to provide an example of a country that uses "dinar" in its currency name. The correct choice must name a specific country with a dinar-named currency. The notes give exactly one such example: Bahrain's Bahraini dinar.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Bahrain uses the Bahraini dinar as its national currency.: Names Bahrain as a specific country using "dinar" in its currency — exactly what the goal requires. ✓
  • Choice B — Bahrain does not refer to its currency by the Latin word "denarius.": A negative claim about Bahrain that gives no example of a dinar currency. ✗
  • Choice C — Today, several countries use the word "dinar" in naming their currencies.: Generalizes without naming any specific country; no example is provided. ✗
  • Choice D — The Latin word "denarius" is the origin of the Arabic word "dinar.": Discusses etymology, not an example of a country using "dinar." ✗
A is correct.
